hardware: M2 MacBook Pro, 16GB RAM, macOS 15 (loopback channels)
note: All benchmarks use in-process channel communication (zero network overhead). Real network Raft will be 5-50x slower depending on RTT.

results.metric: Leader election time (3 nodes, cold start)
results.note: estimated — election timeout range 150-300ms; first election fires within one timeout window

results.metric: Log replication latency (leader to all-followers committed)
results.note: estimated — in-process channel delivery; one heartbeat cycle (50ms) amortises multiple entries

results.metric: Command throughput (3-node cluster, leader absorbs all writes)
results.note: estimated — pipelined submissions; bottleneck is AppendEntries fan-out goroutine overhead
estimated — one missed heartbeat (50ms) + election timeout (150-300ms) + vote round-trip
estimated — JSON serialise 5000 map entries + channel delivery + deserialise on follower
